name: Haloo
short_description: Fight the endless mass of enemies, collect loot, get stronger and Haloo!
detailed_description:
Overview

You will fight against endless river of enemies, collect powerups and find strategies to stay alive as long as possible. There are multiple maps to choose from that have unique strategies to stay away from the enemies. Powerups can give you advantage over enemies but if you are not awake, they will outnumber you. Every once in a while you will face a boss that has a lot more HP and can sometimes end your game in one hit.

Powerups

You will find random item spawns and sometimes enemies drop items too!

Health - Raises your maximum health

Strength - Gives you more damage output

Combination - Gives you both Health and Strength

Speed - Makes you run faster

Critical chance - Raises your critical hit chance

Shooting speed - Your gun shoots faster

Glass Cannon - Makes you powerful but very weak in return

Reload speed - Reload faster

Magazine size - More ammo between each reload

Different size powerups can be found of these types

Secret pickup in each map that you can collect once every run by shooting it

Weapons

7 new unique weapons

Unlocked through score system

Unique shooting and reloading animations

Levels

There are multiple different levels with different themes and layouts. Some levels are more tightly packed with easy access to pickups and others are more open areas but with slightly hidden pickups.

Barn map - Floors in 3 levels, tight inside spaces, pickups visible

Harbor map - Floors in 2 levels, lots of open areas, pickups slightly hidden

Beach map - No elevated floors, lots of open, pickups visible but scattered around

Ship map - Very small and tight, 2 floors, pickups slightly hidden

Space map - Big hangar area and small corridors leading to different areas

Enemies

Shark - Original enemy of the game, usually likes to hang out near water

Scarecrow - Enemy of the farmlands

Alien - Enemy who feels at home in space

Boss Shark - Tough opponent but can give you nice drops

Boss Alien - True alien fighter

Beware this game contains flashing lights!
